calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Kathy Kollehner, CSR #4102.
Saul Ferster, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff John Wai.
Plaintiff was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant, William Pittman, was placed under oath and testified.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Ferster.

Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, Plaintiff John Wai shall recover from defendant William Pittman past due rent in the amount of $2,662.00. This amount shall be made in two installment payments of $1,331.00 each. The first payment of $1,331.00 shall be made by defendant to plaintiff on or before March 15, 2008. The second payment of $1,331.00 shall be made by defendant to plaintiff on or before April 15, 2008.
Plaintiff John Wai is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2144 Grove Street, #1, San Francisco, CA 94117. Defendant William Pittman shall surrender possession of the afore-mentioned premises no later than 5:00 p.m. on February 11, 2008.
Plaintiff shall dismiss this action with prejudice after defendant submits to plaintiff the second and final payment as set forth above.
Each party shall bear their own costs and attorney's fees.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Assigned To Trial Court
